SpaceSystem.name: CCSDS
SpaceSystem.LongDescription: CCSDS Space Packet Protocol header definitions

Parameter.name: eps_per_switch_state
Parameter.LongDescription: Bitmask of all load switch states

Parameter.name: eps_wing_status
Parameter.LongDescription: Solar wing deployment status bitmask (bit0=+Y deployed, bit1=-Y deployed)

MetaCommand.name: EPS_RESET_OC_FLAG
MetaCommand.LongDescription: Reset overcurrent trip flag and re-enable line

MetaCommand.name: EPS_EMERGENCY_LOAD_SHED
MetaCommand.LongDescription: Immediate load shedding to specified stage

Parameter.name: aocs_sun_body_x
Parameter.LongDescription: Sun vector body X (from CSS composite)

Parameter.name: aocs_sun_body_y
Parameter.LongDescription: Sun vector body Y (from CSS composite)

Parameter.name: aocs_sun_body_z
Parameter.LongDescription: Sun vector body Z (from CSS composite)

Parameter.name: aocs_slew_time_remaining
Parameter.LongDescription: Time remaining in active slew maneuver

Parameter.name: aocs_momentum_saturation_pct
Parameter.LongDescription: Total momentum as percentage of max

MetaCommand.name: AOCS_SLEW_TO
MetaCommand.LongDescription: Execute slew maneuver to target quaternion

Parameter.name: tcs_thermal_gradient
Parameter.LongDescription: Thermal gradient (max-min temperature between all zones)

MetaCommand.name: HEATER_AUTO_MODE
MetaCommand.LongDescription: Return heater to autonomous thermostat control

MetaCommand.name: TCS_SET_HEATER_DUTY_LIMIT
MetaCommand.LongDescription: Limit heater duty cycle to prevent excessive thermal cycling

MetaCommand.name: TCS_DECONTAMINATION_START
MetaCommand.LongDescription: Begin decontamination heating sequence for payload

MetaCommand.name: TCS_GET_THERMAL_MAP
MetaCommand.LongDescription: Request current thermal status of all zones

MetaCommand.name: OBC_REBOOT
MetaCommand.LongDescription: Force OBC reboot (drops to boot loader)

MetaCommand.name: OBC_SWITCH_UNIT
MetaCommand.LongDescription: Switch to redundant OBC (A->B or B->A)

MetaCommand.name: OBC_BOOT_APP
MetaCommand.LongDescription: Boot application software from boot loader

MetaCommand.name: EPS_DEPLOY_WING
MetaCommand.LongDescription: Deploy solar wing (+Y, -Y, or both) via burn wire

MetaCommand.name: OBC_GPS_TIME_SYNC
MetaCommand.LongDescription: Synchronise onboard clock with GPS time. Requires GPS 3D fix. WARNING: a time jump may invalidate AOCS attitude solution — AOCS may transition to SAFE_BOOT.

Parameter.name: ttc_eb_n0
Parameter.LongDescription: Energy per bit to noise density

Parameter.name: ttc_cmd_decode_timer
Parameter.LongDescription: Dedicated command channel timer (15 min countdown)

MetaCommand.name: TTC_SET_MODULATION
MetaCommand.LongDescription: Set modulation scheme. Changes symbol mapping and effective data rate. BPSK is the default safe mode. Higher-order schemes increase throughput but require better Eb/N0.

Argument.name: mode
Argument.LongDescription: 0=BPSK (1 bit/sym, most robust), 1=QPSK (2 bit/sym), 2=8PSK (3 bit/sym, needs +3.6 dB), 3=OQPSK (2 bit/sym, offset timing)

Parameter.name: payload_att_error_deg
Parameter.LongDescription: Attitude error used for quality calculation

Parameter.name: payload_integration_time_ms
Parameter.LongDescription: Detector integration time (average of all bands)

MetaCommand.name: PAYLOAD_CAPTURE
MetaCommand.LongDescription: Trigger image capture with scene metadata

Argument.name: lines
Argument.LongDescription: Number of CCD lines to capture

MetaCommand.name: PAYLOAD_DELETE_IMAGE
MetaCommand.LongDescription: Delete specific image from payload memory

MetaCommand.name: PAYLOAD_SET_INTEGRATION_TIME
MetaCommand.LongDescription: Set per-band detector integration times (4 floats)

MetaCommand.name: PAYLOAD_START_CALIBRATION
MetaCommand.LongDescription: Begin calibration sequence (dark frame + flat field)

MetaCommand.name: EVENT_ENABLE
MetaCommand.LongDescription: Enable event report generation for specified event IDs

MetaCommand.name: EVENT_DISABLE
MetaCommand.LongDescription: Disable event report generation for specified event IDs

MetaCommand.name: S13_CREATE_TRANSFER
MetaCommand.LongDescription: Create download transfer session for image

MetaCommand.name: S13_DOWNLOAD_SEGMENT
MetaCommand.LongDescription: Request segment of image data (1024 bytes per block)

MetaCommand.name: S13_END_TRANSFER
MetaCommand.LongDescription: Complete transfer session and free resources

MetaCommand.name: DUMP_STORE
MetaCommand.LongDescription: Dump contents of onboard TM store

MetaCommand.name: DELETE_STORE
MetaCommand.LongDescription: Delete contents of onboard TM store

MetaCommand.name: CONNECTION_TEST
MetaCommand.LongDescription: Send connection test, expect S17.2 response

Argument.name: action_tc
Argument.LongDescription: TC packet to execute on event
